body: Routing to the team for assistance: @ArthurMa1978

## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member best able to assist.

**Summary:** This issue requests a new release of `Azure.ResourceManager.DevTestLabs` (currently v1.1.1). The reporter has identified a bug where an exception is thrown when loading virtual machine auto-shutdown configuration and the webhook URL is not set. They note the fix appears to already be present in the latest source code.

<details>
<summary>🔍 Issue Analysis</summary>

**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.DevTestLabs` v1.1.1  
**Service:** Azure DevTest Labs  
**Type:** Bug / Release request

The issue describes an exception thrown during VM auto-shutdown config loading when a webhook URL is not set. The reporter believes this is already fixed in the current codebase and is requesting a new NuGet package release to make the fix available.

**Possible debugging/verification steps:**
- Review recent commits to `sdk/devtestlabs/` to confirm the fix is merged
- Check if the fix is in `main` but not yet released
- Review the CHANGELOG for `Azure.ResourceManager.DevTestLabs` to identify the fix
- Validate the current package version and release schedule

</details>

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Selection</summary>

- **Category: `Mgmt`** — The package `Azure.ResourceManager.DevTestLabs` belongs to the Azure Resource Manager (management plane) SDK family.
- **Service: `Devtestlab`** — Corresponds to the Azure DevTest Labs service.
- Confidence is **high** — the package name unambiguously identifies both the category and service.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔗 Similar Issues</summary>

No closely matching open duplicate issues were found via search. If this is a duplicate, a human reviewer may wish to link it.

</details>
